title.en: Ensure all users last password change date is in the past

prose.en: Ensure all users last password change date is in the past

description.en: All users should have a password change date in the past.

rationale.en: If a user's recorded password change date is in the future, then they could bypass any set password expiration.

audit.en: Investigate any users with a password change date in the future and correct them. Locking the account, expiring the password, or resetting the password manually may be appropriate.

remediation.en: Investigate any users with a password change date in the future and correct them. Locking the account, expiring the password, or resetting the password manually may be appropriate.
